notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the php SRPM in CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9. It addresses 65 CVEs: CVE-2014-0185, CVE-2014-3981, CVE-2014-9427, CVE-2014-9767, CVE-2015-0235, and 60 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document

document.title: php security update for CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9
